history.title: Russia's mixed messages on LGBT
history.description: "RTKira Sadovaya is the main heroine of RT's documentary series Trans Reality Kira is a young Russian transgender woman waiting for the gender re-assignment operation that is going to allow her to live her life officially as a woman. She is studying in Moscow, where she also works as a fashion model
